name: eve-character-tracker
description: EVE Online Character Tracker - Desktop App

scripts.build:service: if exist build\service rmdir /s /q build\service & if exist dist\service rmdir /s /q dist\service & python -m PyInstaller service.spec --noconfirm
scripts.build: npm run build:service && npm run build:ui
scripts.build:unsigned: npm run build:service && npm run build:ui:unsigned
